Easier Training Starts with Better Training Treats

Pupford Freeze-Dried Training Treats use ultra-light, high-value freeze-dried protein so you can reward often without overfeeding

Improve Bad Behavior Fast → Backed by the Pupford Promise

Why Pupford

Transform Your Pup's Behavior

Pupford offers the world's best training treats to give you the tools necessary to rid yourself of those annoying and sometimes dangerous pup behaviors.

  • Low Calorie

    Reward good behavior without worrying about your pup's health.

  • Very Tasty

    Real ingredients mean real flavor and REALLY strong motivation.

  • Bite Sized

    Each treat is small, easy to give and doesn't need to be broken apart.

  • No Mess

    No crumbs, no residue, no weird stuff under your fingernails.

Our Maltese is absolutely obsessed

With these freeze-dried chicken training treats! The moment he hears the bag, he comes running. Perfect size for training, and I love that they're made with real ingredients.

Best Training Treats Ever

My dog absolutely adores the taste. Seriously, their eyes light up the moment they see the bag! This high palatability is key for keeping them engaged and motivated, especially when working on more challenging commands or in distracting environments.

Not Just Jasper
